name: shared-plan-handoff
description: Repo-first handoff workflow that turns approved plans into reviewed Notion execution workspaces for humans and agents.

interface.shortDescription: Turn approved repo plans into reviewed Notion execution workspaces that humans and agents can share.
interface.longDescription: Use approved repo plans, task-graph review gates, rescue scans, and a Notion execution workspace to keep humans and agents aligned without relying on hidden shell steps.
defaultPrompt: Register an approved repo plan, review the handoff, and build the Notion workspace.
Rescue a messy project, make the true goal explicit, and publish shared context.
Execute the next ready task and keep the Notion PM surface current.
